name: /spec reads the active profile resolved standards source-folder set when generating tests
command:
mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/google profiles && printf 'source:
  id: google-tsguide
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
    detector: x
' > generated-code-quality-standards/google/tsguide.yaml && printf 'extends: [google:tsguide]
rules:
  g-ts-001: error
' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/spec.sh" "feature x" --profile profiles/p.yaml --root generated-code-quality-standards --emit-grounding 2>out.txt && grep -q 'consulted_source=google/tsguide.yaml' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
